title: KYC Assessment
description: A KYC (Know Your Customer) assessment is an assessment conducted by businesses and financial institutions to verify and confirm the identity of their customers or clients. The primary purpose of a KYC assessment is to prevent illegal activities, such as money laundering, terrorist financing, and fraud, by ensuring that customers are who they claim to be.

KYCChekType.description: Specifies the type of due diligence checks carried out on a party. For definitions of ordinary, simple and enhanced know your customer checks, local market regulations should be consulted. (ISO20022)
